title: Victory Will Be Ours Forever
overview: The Baam, a race of winged aliens, launch an attack under the command of young commander Richter to make the Earth their second home. Kazuya Ryuzaki and his colleagues are Earth's last line of defense, using the new energy "Daimolite" to power Earth's greatest weapon: the combat robot Daimos!

title: The Mysterious Girl Erika
overview: Who is the beautiful girl named Erika, and why does she have no memory of her past? Regardless, Kazuya finds himself drawn to this mysterious woman.

title: Memory Of The White Wing
overview: Kazuya returns to the base with Erika. However, it was the cold eyes of the surroundings that were waiting for them. A mysterious corps that aims at Erika who escaped from the base without being crushed. Erika, scream, proof of love!

title: My Brother - Earth's Enemy
overview: Is Erica an enemy spy ?! The eyes of Kyoshiro, who is distrustful, shines. Erika, who was hurt by the attack of the enemy army and fell down, suddenly remembers her past.

title: The Terrible Sin
overview: There are also facts that people who do not know are happy. Unfortunately, I ran a deep crack with Ichiya, which Erica remembered. Erica took off in the dark night sky without telling her beloved Ichiya.

title: Wipe Away Your Tears And Rise
overview: Erica is an enemy spy !? Erica's disappearance has raised more and more suspicions. Erica discovered by Kyoshiro's desperate search. But what happened to Erica !?

title: Joanna The Sentimental Warrior
overview: Ichiya suffers from unforgettable Erica. Nana sees such a arrow and goes to the stormy sea alone. With a faint love for Ichiya in her chest, Nana's cry of sadness echoes in the night sky.

title: True Feelings Exposed
overview: Waiting for Erica to return to the undersea castle was Richter's rigorous pursuit. Erica, who wishes for peace, did not speak stubbornly. However, Erica witnessed the crisis of Deimos ...

title: The Martyr Warrior
overview: Kill Kazuya Tatsuzaki! Richter, who slams his anger and hatred, orders the assassination of Garney Halleck, Balm's premier swordsman. Ichiya faces a duel after receiving a duel. As expected ...

title: The Righteous Rebellion
overview: Ichiya, who secretly meets Margarete, the messenger of the enemy Balm, is about to be arrested by police. Is Ichiya an enemy spy !? Secretary Miwa was furious ...

title: The Ballad of Love and Betrayal
overview: What was Kyoshiro's fiancée !? Suddenly, Reiko appeared in front of Kyoshiro. Kyoshiro who runs away is finally captivated by her love. However, for the time being, the two who forgave were easily captured by the enemy, the Balm Alien.

title: The Archangel of Death
overview: Enemy combat Robo Gavotte has landed on Etajima. Richter, who kneels down on Daimos, has launched a sneaky operation involving the public. Daimos protects the peace of the earth! Ichiya dared to stand up, but ...

title: Erika's Hazardous Flight
overview: Erica's little friend Cindy has drawn Erica's heart and told Ichiya the day of her reunion. Ichiya's heart for Erica runs. Erica flies to reveal everything to Ichiya. Is it really a trap ?

title: Erika Fights Richard
overview: Daimos was exposed to the attack of the invisible combat Robo Klein. The voice that echoed out of nowhere was Erica's voice. Why Erica attacks Ichiya? Why?

title: Is Princess Erika A Murderer?
overview: Ichiya suffered from an unexpected confession of Erica. At that time, he witnessed the death of his father, Dr. Tatsuzaki, and said that Yoshioka, who had been missing after that, returned. Ichiya connected the wishes of Ichigo.

title: Treachery On Devil's Island
overview: Richter drank tears and sentenced him. The rebels Erica will be sentenced to death in the square tomorrow morning! Erica was dressed in her mother's keepsake dress and bit her short life.

title: Erika's Escape From Brahm
overview: Erica climbs the death penalty. The light of Erica's heart, hoping for peace with the earth, was about to go out. However, among the people watching over the execution, there was the face of the director of Warlin Hospital.

title: Erika A Prisoner
overview: After a close call, Warin and Erica were rescued. However, what was waiting for Erica was the rough torture of Secretary Miwa, who had all the Balm aliens as enemies.

title: The Messenger From Brahm
overview: Erica escapes from the destroyed defense base. However, Erica has been housed in a mysterious spaceship. What is this man who stubbornly rejected Richter's request to return Erica?

title: The Battle For Peace
overview: The ring left by Melbi led Erica to the abandoned metropolis. Waiting for Erica there was a man called Ballandok. Who is Ballandoke ?

title: The Wait For Peace
overview: A peaceful and defenseless city was suddenly attacked by the Balm Alien. The Defense Force, Secretary Miwa, launched an indiscriminate counterattack involving the citizens. Furious Ichiya sees Erica's face among the fleeing citizens!

title: A Visit From The Past
overview: One day in front of Kyoshiro, my grandfather Yuzuki Ichitosai suddenly appeared. However, Kyoshiro had a past that he couldn't forgive his grandfather. Kyoshiro confronts Itosai's mystery of the sword, the Yuzuki Sky Flying Sword.

title: A Wedding For Bertha
overview: Recently, my mom is strange. Nana has seen a mother who is fascinated by the bride's costume. Nana decides to take her to a grave to become a cupid of love ...

title: Joanna's Secret Weapon
overview: Cairo, who was forced into the bath, struggled to get revenge on Nana. Cairo was burning with a big invention to take a picture of Nana's nakedness. What is the big invention?

title: A Battle To The Death
overview: Earth capture that does not progress slowly. Chief Gishi Balm died mercilessly during the production of the Combat Robo. Richter, who saw it, wasn't crushed and finally set sail for Dymovic himself!

title: The Imminent Defeat Of Daimos
overview: What is the mysterious person, the mysterious spaceship that saved Richter's crisis !? And the attack of the new battle robot completed by the best scientific power of Balm star put Daimos to the brink of death.

title: Daimos' New Weapons
overview: It's only a matter of time before Daimos is defeated by the Mecha Warrior completed by Isamu. However, it is almost impossible to power up the energy of Deimos several tens of times. Is the fate of Daimos so far ?

title: A Warrior's Death
overview: Daimos achieved a power-up with Isaron particles. But that energy was developed by the genius scientist Isamu. Isamu laughed and showed a countermeasure. What is that terrifying secret ?

title: A Sense of Duty
overview: Richter's wrath, mourning Isamu's death, manifested itself as a global assault command. A total attack was launched on Dymovic at the United Nations Headquarters. Secretary Miwa did not give up that he should use the hydrogen bomb at the expense of the inhabitants.

title: The Race Against Time
overview: Dr. Izumi saved himself from the explosion of Dymovic. However, he was seriously injured and wandered the deadline. Who can save the doctor's life? What is the fate of Dymovic, which is severely destroyed and damaged ?

title: Baradox's Last Stand
overview: A disk that had escaped from the balm star to the earth. Knowing this, Secretary Miwa rushed the fleet to capture the disk. Unexpectedly, I found a liberated area where Erica and Barandook hide.

title: The Exodus to the Southern Regions
overview: What Barandoke's death left for Erica and his friends was a journey into a long and harsh winter season. Erika, who was targeted by Richter and called her nemesis by Secretary Miwa, just rushed through the snowstorm.

title: Bertha's Nephew
overview: At Dymovic, I thought of Erica, who was missing, and every day was heartbreaking. One day, an uncontrollable naughty priest came. Its name is George Kojima. Motota, who dreams of fighting in Deimos, boarded a triper and jumped out.

title: Ulrich's Downfall
overview: Barbus' younger brother, Himley, suddenly escapes from Balm. A surprising fact came from his mouth to the undersea castle. And it will make a big difference to Admiral Richter!

title: The Conversion of Zendor
overview: An undersea castle that fell into the hands of Geroyer. Now, surely something is starting in the Balm Alien. Is it a rebellion? Is it a plot !? The enemy general Barbas was unexpectedly launched on the beach of Daimovic.

title: Richard's Mission of Peace
overview: Indeed, Richter was pushed into the sea by a mecha warrior. However, Richter's corpse has not been found anywhere. What if !? Geroyer begins a desperate search.

title: The Sacrificial Bride
overview: Erica hastened to build a spaceship to return to Balm to overthrow Orban. However, the spaceship exploded in an accident. The secret base has collapsed. Hunger, cold, and blizzards push Erica into hell.

title: Daimos or Death
overview: Erica became Orban's bride and left the earth. Waiting for the remaining Ichiya was the arrest, imprisonment, and torture by Secretary Miwa. Secretary Miwa robbed Daimos from Ichiya.

title: Richard the Traitor
overview: UN inquiry committee members asking why they wouldn't give Daimos to Miwa. Ichiya stubbornly shakes his head. A letter arrives from the enemy general, Geroyer, to Ichiya who was in a difficult situation!

title: Space Dynamo
overview: Suddenly, an undersea castle was involved in the explosion of a submarine volcano. Only at this time, the rebels led by Miwa devoted all their power to attacking the undersea castle. The move of Secretary Miwa, who is impatient, puts Daimos in danger!

title: Richard's Love Betrayed
overview: The key to unraveling all mysteries is Balm Star. Dymovic headed for the asteroid belt. But sudden news. It was a voice calling for help from Erica.

title: To Vanquish a Tyrant
overview: A spaceship invaded the small balm, confused by the endless meteor shower. It was Richter and Liza. At the small balm, there is a factory inauguration ceremony to turn a billion people into machine humans.

title: Prelude to the Battle
overview: By the time Fanfare, celebrating the marriage of Erica and Alban, rang in the temple, Daimos was under the onslaught of his enemies. What was the last strategy left for Daimos? What is the fate of the billion-star balm people ?

title: Ulrich's Absolution
overview: Waiting for Ichiya to know Erica's true intention was the fierce attack of Gott Armon, the guardian deity of Balm. And that wasn't the only thing that stood in the way of hunting down Orban. Richter? And Erica ?
